description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows and wooden accent panels, giving it a contemporary and airy appearance. The house features multiple outdoor spaces, including a patio with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a dining area. Several trees and landscaped elements are integrated into the property, enhancing its suburban feel. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing the modern architectural style.
description: A modern, two-story white house with flat roofs, large windows, wood accents, and outdoor living spaces including a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, large windows, entryway, and landscaped trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's depth, flat rooflines, and the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the pool, patio, outdoor furniture, and extensive window arrangements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the patio, pool, and additional landscaping elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some symmetrical rows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with minimal overhang, no porch, and clean lines
